body.title: [sprint] Remove G-xxx goal-link check from audit-hypothesis (Check 3)
body.intention: I intend that audit-hypothesis no longer validates G-xxx goal links or references palace.goals.* — Check 3 becomes an intention-link check or is dropped.
body.description:
skills/audit-hypothesis/SKILL.md Check 3 is 'Goal link is valid and active' — it validates G-xxx against palace.goals.* and checks KR plausibility. Goals are retired (IBD); the hypothesis now carries 'goal: none' and Check 3 currently allows that but retains all the G-xxx vocabulary. The check should either (a) be dropped (since 'none' is always the answer now) or (b) reframed to validate the intention statement is present and non-empty.

**Affected files:** skills/audit-hypothesis/SKILL.md only.
**Design rules:** goals-being-retired, delete-after-successful-merge.
**Scope boundary:** IN - reframe or drop Check 3 in audit-hypothesis; remove G-xxx/palace.goals refs. OUT - other audit checks. OUT - the hypothesis input format (that changes in T-skills-goals-to-intentions via /sorted).
**Test plan:** grep skills/audit-hypothesis/SKILL.md for G-xxx, palace.goals, goal link -> 0. Skill still returns PASS/AMEND on a valid hypothesis.
**Completion criteria:** grep -ic 'G-xxx|palace.goals|goal link|goal.*KR' skills/audit-hypothesis/SKILL.md = 0.
